name: workspace
description: Business analysis agent storefront (chat + admin + checkout).

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @helix/backend & npm run dev -w @helix/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @helix/backend && npm run build -w @helix/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @helix/backend && npm run test -w @helix/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @helix/backend && npm run lint -w @helix/frontend
